title: Ordered a month ago, not shipped, no response to emails
body: Ordered these shoes a month ago. Received an email that they were shipped but the tracking information says they are still waiting on the package. I have sent two emails inquiring about the status and have not received a reply. This seems like a scam company and I have just opened a dispute with my credit card company. Do not order from this company.

title: Nearly 2 months, no shoes, tracking shows delivered to random pickup point
body: I would give zero stars if possible. This company seems to be a complete scam. I ordered a pair of shoes nearly two months ago and have not received them. The tracking information states it has been delivered to a pick-up point but does not provide an address and I never requested this. Customer service is of no help. Do not waste your money on this company.

title: Cheap man-made materials, foot slides in shoe, must return to China
body: Shoes are not good quality. They are made of all man-made materials and my feet sweat in them terribly. The sole insert is so slick my foot slides in the shoe. Also not very much cushion. Their return policy is ridiculous. You have to send back to China on your dime. And they say it might take 3 months for them to receive and another 2 weeks for them to process.

title: Dropshipping AliExpress junk at huge markup
body: It's a dropshipping site. They buy cheap junk from AliExpress and sell it to you at a huge markup. The ads are stolen or faked. You will either get nothing, or a cheap piece of plastic that looks nothing like the ad. Avoid.

title: 6 weeks, cheapest plastic shoes I've seen, misleading pictures
body: Don't do it. I fell for the ad. It took 6 weeks to get them and they are the cheapest, most uncomfortable plastic shoes I've ever seen. The pictures are completely misleading. Customer service just gives you the runaround when you ask for a refund.

title: Flimsy, sizing way off, return to China nightmare
body: They're awful. Flimsy, sizing is way off, and they feel like they'll fall apart in a week. The return process is a nightmare, they want you to pay to ship them back to China. It's a total scam.

title: Ordered March 10, no update since March 17, no refund
body: I ordered shoes from this company 3-10-24. They stated delivery would be 7-10 days. I have not received the shoes and the tracking has not been updated since 3-17-24. I have asked for a refund from the company and have not heard back.

title: Must ship returns to China, cost more than shoes
body: Product is not what was expected. Want to return the items but company is giving me the run around. I requested a return authorization and they replied that I would have to pay for the shipping which I already knew. The problem is they want me to send it to China. The cost would be more than what I paid for the shoes. This is unacceptable and they should have a return address in the US for US customers.

title: Deceptive advertising, poor quality, nonexistent customer service
body: I am writing to file a formal complaint against The Xstance for their deceptive advertising, abysmal product quality, and nonexistent customer service. On January 23, 2024, I purchased a pair of shoes based on advertisements promising superior comfort and quality. The reality was a stark contrast; the shoes are of poor quality, uncomfortable, and do not match the advertised images.
